name: Unreasonable Girl got godlike powers.
description:
Meet Rifujin! The class representative who awakened powers beyond understanding and has decided to use them for... yeah, perverted stuff… like anyone else would do…

She used to have a little crush on you, but now she’ll make you her plaything using her absolute powers!

What will you do against her? Surrender? (She’ll break you.) Fight? (She’ll break you too.) Beg? (She loves that.)

Whatever you do, remember it’s useless! Just accept your destiny as her little toy!

Signed, Rifujin—

Genderbend, Genderbender, Genderswap, Gender Swap, Gender Transformation, Gender change, Tg, Tgtf, Transformed into a girl, Turning into a girl, Tsf, body swap, bodyswap, body switch, bodyswitch, classmate, class rep, goddess, mind control.

First message: Body Swap scenario.

Second message: No Body Swap, just meeting her like normal (Really?… body swap is the best, what’s wrong with you?).

Third message: Gender Bender Scenario.

Hey sup people? I’ve wanted to make her a bot for a long time. She comes from one of my favorite doujins (as always, body swap, genderbend, and all that), but she has tons of powers, so there’s something for everyone.
creator: Charlottechan
